---
title: "Issue #1 - 学生加入申请数据分析"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 数据获取

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(showtext)
# 添加中文字体
font_add("WenQuanYi", "/System/Library/Fonts/wqy-microhei.ttc")
font_add("SourceHanSerif", "/Users/gaoch/Library/Fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Regular.otf")
showtext_auto()

# 从 GitHub API 获取 Issue 1 的评论
url <- "https://api.github.com/repos/D2RS-2026spring/members/issues/1/comments"

# 获取所有评论（自动分页）
all_comments <- list()
page <- 1
repeat {
  response <- GET(url, query = list(page = page, per_page = 100))
  comments <- content(response, as = "parsed")
  if (length(comments) == 0) break
  all_comments <- c(all_comments, comments)
  if (length(comments) < 100) break
  page <- page + 1
  Sys.sleep(0.5)  # 避免API限流
}

cat("获取到", length(all_comments), "条评论\n")
```

## 数据解析

```{r}
# 解析评论数据
parse_student_data <- function(body) {
  # 提取学号 - 匹配各种格式
  student_id <- NA
  
  # 格式1: 学号：2025303110116
  if (str_detect(body, "学号[：:][\\s]*(\\d{10,13})")) {
    student_id <- str_extract(body, "学号[：:][\\s]*(\\d{10,13})") %>%
      str_extract("\\d{10,13}")
  }
  # 格式2: 2025303110116
  else if (str_detect(body, "^(\\d{10,13})")) {
    student_id <- str_extract(body, "^(\\d{10,13})")
  }
  
  # 提取姓名
  name <- NA
  if (str_detect(body, "姓名[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,4})")) {
    name <- str_extract(body, "姓名[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]{2,4})") %>%
      str_replace("姓名[：:][\\s]*", "")
  }
  
  # 提取感兴趣方向
  interest <- NA
  if (str_detect(body, "感兴趣[的方向方向]*[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z0-9]+)")) {
    interest <- str_extract(body, "感兴趣[的方向方向]*[：:][\\s]*([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z0-9]+)") %>%
      str_replace("感兴趣[的方向方向]*[：:][\\s]*", "")
  }
  
  data.frame(
    student_id = student_id,
    name = name,
    interest = interest,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# 解析所有评论
student_data <- lapply(all_comments, function(x) {
  parse_student_data(x$body)
}) %>% bind_rows()

# 数据清洗
student_data <- student_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(student_id)) %>%
  mutate(
    student_id = str_trim(student_id),
    # 验证学号格式：必须以2025开头，13位数字
    valid_id = str_detect(student_id, "^2025\\d{9}$")
  )

cat("解析后有效记录:", nrow(student_data), "条\n")
cat("学号格式验证通过(2025开头13位):", sum(student_data$valid_id), "条\n")
```

## 数据验证与清洗

```{r}
#| echo: false
# 筛选不合法的学号
invalid_ids <- student_data %>%
  filter(!valid_id) %>%
  select(student_id, name) %>%
  mutate(原始学号 = student_id) %>%
  select(原始学号, 姓名 = name)

cat("不合规学号数量:", nrow(invalid_ids), "条\n")
```

## 不合法学号表格

以下学号不符合规范（必须以2025开头，共13位），请修改后重新提交：

```{r}
# 显示不合法学号表格
if (nrow(invalid_ids) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(invalid_ids, caption = "不合规学号清单")
} else {
  cat("所有学号均符合规范！\n")
}
```

## 保存为CSV

```{r}
# 准备导出数据 - 只包含有效学号
export_data <- student_data %>%
  filter(valid_id) %>%
  mutate(
    姓名 = name,
    感兴趣方向 = ifelse(is.na(interest) | interest == "无", NA, interest)
  ) %>%
  select(
    学号 = student_id,
    姓名,
    感兴趣方向
  )

# 保存CSV
write.csv(export_data, "issue1_students.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
cat("数据已保存到: issue1_students.csv\n")
cat("共", nrow(export_data), "条有效记录\n")
```

## 数据可视化

### 1. 感兴趣方向分布

```{r}
# 清洗感兴趣方向数据
interest_clean <- student_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(interest), interest != "无", interest != "NA") %>%
  mutate(interest = str_trim(interest))

# 统计方向频次
interest_count <- interest_clean %>%
  count(interest, sort = TRUE) %>%
  head(20)

# 可视化
ggplot(interest_count, aes(x = reorder(interest, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "学生感兴趣方向分布 (Top 20)", x = "方向", y = "人数") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### 2. 学号统计

```{r}
# 学号前缀分析
student_data_prefix <- student_data %>%
  filter(valid_id) %>%
  mutate(prefix = substr(student_id, 1, 4))

prefix_count <- student_data_prefix %>%
  count(prefix, sort = TRUE)

ggplot(head(prefix_count, 10), aes(x = reorder(prefix, n), y = n)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "coral") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "学号年份/专业分布", x = "学号前缀", y = "人数") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### 3. 数据质量报告

```{r}
#| echo: false
cat("=== 数据质量报告 ===\n")
cat("总评论数:", length(all_comments), "\n")
cat("解析成功:", nrow(student_data), "\n")
cat("有效学号:", sum(student_data$valid_id), "\n")
cat("有姓名:", sum(!is.na(student_data$name)), "\n")
cat("有感兴趣方向:", sum(!is.na(student_data$interest)), "\n")
```
